description_long: This hat features a wide, circular brim with a slightly undulating edge, rendered in a dark brown color that gives it a natural, earthy appearance. The crown is domed and smoothly transitions into the brim, with a subtle texture that suggests a felt or similar material. The underside of the brim and the lower portion of the crown are a pale, muted green, providing a striking contrast to the darker upper section. The hat has no visible seams, bands, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The overall silhouette is reminiscent of a traditional sun hat or mushroom cap, offering ample shade and coverage. The structure appears lightweight and comfortable, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A wide-brimmed, dark brown hat with a domed crown and pale green underside, featuring a minimalist, natural design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, dark brown brim and domed crown, with two small, arched black shapes on the pale green lower crown.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a single, larger black silhouette on the pale green lower crown, with the brim's width and curvature clearly visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays two arched black shapes on the pale green lower crown, mirroring the front but with a slightly different arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the same large black silhouette as view 1, highlighting the symmetry of the brim and crown.
